parameters.content:
## Workflow E — Scheduled Surge Testing

**Trigger:** Schedule Trigger every 2 hours

**Purpose:** Automatically fires surge tests overnight and during off-hours without manual intervention. 50% random gate = ~1 surge every 4 hours on average. Creates unpredictable timing that better simulates organic campaign spikes.

**Flow:**
Surge schedule (2h) → Random surge gate (50% pass) → Dispatch scheduled surge (GitHub Action, surge mode) → Notify Discord

**Discord notification:** Posts to #gamers-lab-monitor every time it fires so the team knows when automated testing happened.

**Use case:** Leave running overnight before a planned campaign launch to build up baseline surge data. Each fired surge runs 120 concurrent requests (20 per region × 6 regions).

**Note:** This is the background automated surge. For one-off timed surges keyed to specific events (e.g. game launch day, Reddit post) use Workflows F + G.

parameters.jsCode:
if (Math.random() > 0.5) { return []; }
return [{ json: { proceed: true } }];

parameters.content:
⚡ **Scheduled surge test fired**

Automated campaign spike simulation starting across all 6 regions.
